creator: freebsd@nagilum.org
text:
The URL used to determine the external IP (http://stuff.xergio.net/ip.php)  is no longer working.

Fix: Apply attached patch to the irssi-scripts port which introduces a patch that replaces the old URL with http://checkip.dyndns.com/  and adjusts the regexp to match properly.
How-To-Repeat: 	start irssi then "/run /usr/local/share/irssi/scripts/ipupdate.pl"
